title: 'Eliydad #0449
definition:
Elidad = "my God has loved"

 1) a Benjamite chief who helped apportion his tribe's allotment
    to the Promised Land
nasbUsage:

 1) a Benjamite chief who helped apportion his tribe's allotment
    to the Promised Land

    NASB:  God has loved, an Isr. name
